meta.title: The Most Delightful Way to Earn Yields on Your SOL

transcript: Ooh. Uh, hi everybody. Um, I thought like on a Saturday is the last three talks, I thought nobody was here, but uh, you guys are still here, so good on you. I would have checked out long time ago. Uh, okay, I'm FP from Sanctum. Uh, I want to talk to you guys about the most delightful way to earn yields on your SOL. Um, okay, cool. I believe in three things, um, in terms of like kind of like um, what Solana needs. Like first, I think that, you know, here of us all at Breakpoint that we all believe in Solana as an asset. And I think that it's one of the best assets in the world and everyone should hold and stake Solana. And the second thing I believe is that um... Yeah, the second thing I believe is that how we hold stake Solana, it really depends on the UX. And so I want to talk to you guys a little bit about how people currently hold and stake Solana today, um, and then I I want to tell you about what we're doing at Sanctum today. So for version one of native staking, right, this is when you uh, your validators run, uh, this is when you, sorry, you do native staking, your you stake your SOL to a validator, the validator runs, and you kind of earn yield from that, right? This secures the network, it's really good for the network. Um, the problem with this is that the UX kind of sucks, right? So um, it's it's good but like you have to think about like what is an epoch, right? Like you have to think about this activation and deactivation to before you get yields on your Solana. Um, there's all these things like splitting and merging stake accounts and it's all a bunch of like stuff that really is like Solana internals and we really don't want, you know, users to really kind of think about all this stuff uh, if they want to secure the network, right? Um, and so liquid staking is this next evolution, right, of uh, earning yields on Solana. It's a sort of like significantly uh, better UX, right? So tokens are like like it's it's a bunch of like ah, sorry. Significantly better UX because uh, with a liquid staking token it's a first-class citizen in the wallet, right? And so people understand tokens, you just buy to start earning yields and you sell to exit, right? And so the the UX is fantastic and therefore they've enjoyed sort of phenomenal success, right? Sanctum has helped Jupiter, uh, Bybit, um, uh, DeFi Dev Corp, right, and a bunch of all the others, right? So we have over sort of like 2 billion dollars uh, in TVL today, right? So these are some of the teams... oh, thank you. So these are some of the teams that we help earn yield on their SOL, right, so big shout out to them, right? And so as I said it's it's like a it's like a token, right, you get it and then you get it in your wallet and it sort of accrues yield over time, right? And as you can see, right, you here you it go up goes up over time, right? And so but the problem is that they're not really perfect either. So you know you buy at some point there and then you end at some point there and really what you want to you have to do is you kind of have to do a math problem, right? It's like oh I bought this amount of SOL uh, at this point and then I sold it at this point, right, like 11 months ago so what did what's the APY? How much did I make? Right? It's not it's not entirely clear uh, but you know nonetheless, right, it's still it's still a really nice product. Um, and so like what kind of like if you think about the going back to the drawing board, right, like thinking about what is like the cleanest and simplest uh, Solana staking experience given our expertise to this field, right, we really went to go back to the drawing board. So I'm happy to introduce uh, the Sanctum App, which is the most delightful way to earn yields on Solana. Yeah. It's really cute, right? Yeah. So the app is very very simple but I want to talk through kind of like quickly the decisions that we made uh, in building this app. So first of all like we're going delight first, right? So we're giving our beloved blobs an uplift and we're putting them pride of place in the Sanctum App. Um, I believe that there can always be more delight in the world and we go the extra mile to delight so I think this is like super cute. Um, we want people to feel loved and cared for so we spent a lot of time and energy thinking about making a delightful experience for you, right? Um, and then this is, you know, one of the features, right? Uh, we have daily yields that is synchronized across the time for everyone on Solana so everyone on Solana can have something to look forward to, right, which I think is kind of cool, right? And then finally of course, you know, you can see how much you've earned over time. Now all of this is kind of very very simple. Um, we're deliberately keeping the scope extremely small uh, but an extremely delightful experience. Now obviously we have a lot of things in the pipeline but as of today this is what I have for you today, right? Um, and if you're interested please join the waitlist and also we have a bunch of these uh, to give out today. Uh, I think we we don't want to bring this home to Singapore so uh, please uh, come and get it from me. Yeah. Thank you very much. Yeah.

Dec 2, 2025 4:05 PM Eastern Standard Time
# **Forward Industries Partners with Sanctum to Launch fwdSOL Liquid Staking Token**
Share
NEW YORK--([BUSINESS WIRE](https://www.businesswire.com))--Forward Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: FWDI) (“Forward Industries” or the "Company"), today announced a strategic partnership with Sanctum to launch fwdSOL, a new liquid staking token (LST) that enables the Company to generate staking yield on SOL while unlocking additional sources of return through DeFi and institutional borrowing strategies.
Through the partnership, SOL delegated by Forward Industries to Sanctum will be represented by approximately 1,725,100 fwdSOL, corresponding to 25% of the Company’s SOL holdings. By converting staked SOL into fwdSOL, Forward Industries can continue earning native staking yield while deploying the LST across a range of on-chain opportunities to enhance performance. These include using fwdSOL as collateral to borrow assets, which can then be allocated into vetted DeFi protocols or revenue-generating strategies with the Company’s institutional partners.
As a part of the partnership, Forward has the opportunity to add CLOUD to its holdings and potentially purchase more from Sanctum in the future.

# Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults

*Nest vaults with assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal and issuers including Securitize and SuperState mark the beginning of a new yield economy forSolana.*
NEW YORK,Dec. 5, 2025/PRNewswire/ --[Plume](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=1349188964&u=https://plume.org/&a=Plume), the leading RWA blockchain powering real-world yield, today announced the launch of five RWA Nest vaults onSolana, setting real-world yield as a new base layer for the ecosystem and marking an important first step in Plume's multichain expansion for Nest.
Launching the vaults natively onSolanagives users direct investment opportunities to institutional-grade assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal, and issuers including Securitize and SuperState.Solanausers can natively access onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables and the ability to earn institutional-grade real-world yield.
With the launch of nBASIS, nOPAL, nWISDOM, nALPHA and nTBILL Vaults,Solana's 20+ million users can soon deposit stablecoins natively into Nest to unlock reliable, stable, real-world APY. Each deposit returns a Nest vaulttoken, a liquid, yield-bearing asset that accrues value over time and can move seamlessly acrossSolanaDeFi, from DEX liquidity pools to lending and structured products, with the ability to redeem at any point.
As part of this integration, Plume is also launching a deep partnership with[Squads Lab](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=2271106279&u=https://squads.xyz/&a=Squads+Lab),Solana's leading multi-sig and treasury management infrastructure provider. Plume will introduce its RWA yield pipelines across the Squads ecosystem, including a bespoke vault integrated for Altitude users and seamless RWA yield access for developers building with Grid.
*"Cryptois moving past the era of synthetic yield and into a market grounded in real economics. Stablecoins brought millions intocrypto, but yieldcoins will keep them here. This integration withSolanais the next step in building a transparent, programmable financial system at scale."*said Teddy Pornprinya, Co-Founder and CBO at Plume.
*"Plume already anchors over half of the industry's RWA activity, andSolanahas become one of the most efficient, high-throughput environments incrypto, making it a natural home for onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables. Bringing our strengths together is how we unlock the next phase of onchain finan*ce".
By introducing institutional RWAs at scale, Plume is expanding theSolanaDeFiecosystem with sustainable, composable yield infrastructure that can underpin the next generation ofSolana-native financial applications.
Solanausers can instantly access boosted yield opportunities with Nest.
The Plume Nest Points Program is a rewards framework designed to turn participation into ownership. Users can earn Plume Nest Points by holding and using Nest vault tokens. The more users hold and deploy, the more they earn as part of the Season One program.
Solanausers will also soon unlock boosted yield opportunities with direct access to lending markets on Loopscale. These platform integrations allow leverage

tags.impact_reason: Keynote discussing improvements to liquid staking UX with the Sanctum app and their $2B TVL, representing a solid update to Solana's DeFi ecosystem.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a sleek, personal vault as the Semantic Anchor because it physically represents the concepts of 'Sanctum' (a safe place) and the 'savings account' experience mentioned in the text. It transforms the complex, abstract idea of liquid staking into a simple, secure, and tangible object. I included the diegetic text '8% APY' as a holographic display on the vault to instantly communicate the primary user benefit—earning yield—in a high-impact way that reinforces the 'delight-first' product philosophy.
visual_idea.description: A sleek, minimalist personal vault floats centrally in a dark, serene space. The vault is crafted from dark, brushed aluminum, with a single, seamless line of soft cyan light tracing its door. Projected just above the vault's surface is a small, glowing holographic interface displaying the text '8% APY'. The background is deep and out of focus, with faint, ethereal light patterns suggesting a vast, secure digital environment. The overall feeling is one of effortless security and quiet confidence, like a high-end Apple product for your assets.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A sleek, minimalist personal vault floats centrally in a dark, serene space. The vault is meticulously crafted from dark, brushed aluminum, showcasing a fine, subtle grain that interacts with ambient light, reflecting a sense of robust yet elegant security. A single, seamless line of soft cyan light traces the contours of its door, emanating a gentle, diffused internal glow that highlights its minimalist design. Projected just above the vault's surface is a small, glowing holographic interface, rendered with luminous, ethereal blue light, clearly displaying the text '8% APY' as if floating in three-dimensional space, spatially correct and razor-sharp. The background is deep and out of focus, featuring faint, ethereal light patterns suggesting a vast, secure digital environment. The overall feeling is one of effortless security and quiet confidence, akin to a high-end Apple product for your assets. Vertical composition (3:4 aspect ratio), emphasizing immense height and epic scale. Significant negative space above the vault, which stands monumentally, centered within the frame. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, cinematic lighting, ultra-sharp focus, studio light, deep shadows, volumetric light.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a sleek, personal vault as the Semantic Anchor because it physically represents the concepts of 'Sanctum' (a safe place) and the 'savings account' experience mentioned in the text. It transforms the complex, abstract idea of liquid staking into a simple, secure, and tangible object. I included the diegetic text '8% APY' as a holographic display on the vault to instantly communicate the primary user benefit—earning yield—in a high-impact way that reinforces the 'delight-first' product philosophy.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on the corner of the futuristic personal vault. The camera captures the beautiful texture of the brushed aluminum meeting a glowing, translucent cyan seam. The soft internal light bleeds through the corner, illuminating the precise engineering of the object. The image is abstract and textural, highlighting the premium materials and secure construction without showing the entire vault.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro shot, perfectly centered, focusing intently on the precise corner of a futuristic personal vault. The tight macro framing fills the square (1:1) aspect ratio, emphasizing the beautiful, finely brushed aluminum texture that extends across the frame. A glowing, translucent cyan seam meticulously joins the aluminum panels, emanating a soft internal light that gently bleeds through the corner, creating subtle depth shadows. This illumination highlights the immaculate, minimalist tech engineering and the secure construction of the object. The image is abstract and textural, showcasing premium, realistic materials and ultra-photorealistic detail without revealing the entire vault. The soft internal glow creates a mesmerizing, subtle particle glow effect. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, studio render style, hyperrealistic, photoreal detail.

editorial.headline: Sanctum Attacks the Retail Interface with 'Delight-First' Staking App
editorial.standfirst: The liquid staking infrastructure provider—powering $2B in TVL—moves up the stack to own the customer relationship. The new Sanctum App aims to replace complex LST math with a "savings account" experience for retail users.
key_takeaways: Strategic Pivot: Sanctum moves from pure B2B infrastructure to a B2C strategy, targeting direct retail liquidity.
$2B TVL: The protocol now secures over $2 billion in TVL, underpinning major partners like Jupiter and Bybit.
UX Abstraction: The new app eliminates epoch timing and APY calculations, offering synchronized "daily yields" to mimic traditional finance.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a crowded liquid staking market dominated by yield speculation, **Sanctum** is making a contrarian bet: the next wave of capital won't come from higher APY, but from better feelings. During his Saturday keynote at Breakpoint 2025, Sanctum founder **FP** unveiled the "Sanctum App," a direct-to-consumer mobile interface that abstracts the complexities of the Solana staking ecosystem behind a gamified, "delight-first" user experience.

This marks a significant strategic pivot for the protocol. Until now, Sanctum has operated primarily as the "liquidity plumbing" for the Solana ecosystem, powering the backend for partners like **Jupiter**, **Bybit**, and **DeFi Dev Corp** and amassing over **$2 billion in TVL**. By launching a consumer-facing app, Sanctum is effectively moving up the stack to own the customer relationship directly, bypassing the wallets and exchanges that have traditionally gatekept the staking user experience.

The app's core value proposition is the abstraction of "crypto-native" friction points. Native staking requires understanding epochs, activation periods, and stake account management. Even Liquid Staking Tokens (LSTs)—while an improvement—force users to calculate their actual returns based on entry and exit prices. Sanctum's solution replaces this with "synchronized daily yields," a mechanism that visualizes earnings in real-time, effectively mimicking the user experience of a high-yield savings account rather than a complex DeFi derivative.

For institutional investors, the "cute" branding—featuring animated "blobs"—should not obscure the aggressive market maneuver here. By gamifying the holding of SOL and smoothing out the reward curve, Sanctum is positioning itself to capture sticky retail liquidity that is less mercenary than typical DeFi capital. If successful, this "savings account" layer could become a primary funnel for new SOL deposits, giving Sanctum unprecedented leverage over the underlying validator set distribution.
